mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM DEVICE_AUTH_SVC D, DEVICE_AUTH_USER U WHERE D.SERVICE_NO = U.SERVICE_NO AND D.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND D.END_DT = U.END_DT AND U.SERVICE_NO = '1016020500'::bigint AND U.USER_ID = #{userId} AND U.END_DT = '99991231000000'

SELECT DISTINCT DEVICE_ALIAS, MAC_ADDR, SUBSTR(REG_DT,0,8) REG_DT, IP_ADDR, HDD_SRL_NO FROM DEVICE_AUTH_SVC WHERE END_DT = '99991231000000' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND SERVICE_NO = '1016020500'::bigint
SELECT USER_ID, OTHERPC_YES, OTHERPC_STDT, OTHERPC_ENDT FROM DEVICE_AUTH_USER WHERE SERVICE_NO = '1016020500'::bigint AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND END_DT = '99991231000000'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEVICE_AUTH_SVC ( SERVICE_NO, USER_ID, END_DT, START_DT, MAC_ADDR, IP_ADDR, HDD_SRL_NO, DEVICE_ALIAS, PHONE_NO, REG_GUBUN, REG_DT, REG_ID, MOD_DT, MOD_ID, DEVICE_CLASS ) VALUES ( '1016020500', #{userId}, '99991231000000', TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{macAddress}, 0, #{hddSrlNo}, #{deviceAlias}, #{phoneNo}, #{regGubun}, TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId}, TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId}, #{deviceClass} )
mapper.update: UPDATE DEVICE_AUTH_USER SET MOD_DT = TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), MOD_ID = #{userId}, OTHERPC_YES = 'Y', OTHERPC_STDT = TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE SERVICE_NO = '1016020500' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND END_DT = '99991231000000'

UPDATE DEVICE_AUTH_USER SET MOD_DT = TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), MOD_ID = #{userId}, OTHERPC_YES = NULL, OTHERPC_ENDT = TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE SERVICE_NO = '1016020500' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND END_DT = '99991231000000'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEVICE_AUTH_USER ( SERVICE_NO, USER_ID, END_DT, START_DT, USER_NM, REG_DT, REG_ID, MOD_DT, MOD_ID, OTHERPC_YES, OTHERPC_STDT, OTHERPC_ENDT ) VALUES ( '1016020500', #{userId}, '99991231000000', TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userNm}, TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId}, TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId}, 'Y', TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), NULL )

INSERT INTO DEVICE_AUTH_USER ( SERVICE_NO, USER_ID, END_DT, START_DT, USER_NM, REG_DT, REG_ID, MOD_DT, MOD_ID, OTHERPC_YES, OTHERPC_STDT, OTHERPC_ENDT ) VALUES ( '1016020500', #{userId}, '99991231000000', TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userNm}, TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId}, TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId}, NULL, NULL, TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
